# D-Law — Global Law Guide

> D-Law is an independent educational platform that turns public legal information from many countries into a scrollable feed of plain-language law cards. It is not affiliated with any government or legal authority.

## Pages
- [Home feed](/): Browse and search law cards by country and category.
- [Tenant rights without a written lease](/card/tenant-rights-no-lease): What renters can expect when there is no signed lease.

## Optional
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable index of public pages.
